oldWayItems: Manual keyword search across legal sources with no semantic understanding
No way to check if you found the current version of a law or an outdated amendment
Copy-pasting text between tabs to draft contracts or legal letters from scratch
2+ hours spent per case on research that still may miss relevant precedents
Global AI tools have zero Armenian law coverage
doLegalItems: Ask in Armenian, Russian, or English - get answers grounded in the actual law
Every answer cites the exact article, law code, and source
Generate NDAs, employment contracts, legal letters, and reporting drafts from prompts
Cut research and reporting prep time from 2 hours to under 20 minutes per case
Built specifically for local law - updated regularly from official sources

features.description: doLegal combines legal research, document drafting, and legal assistant guidance - all powered by authoritative legal corpora.

cards.title: Legal Research
cards.description: Ask natural-language questions in Armenian, Russian, or English and receive structured answers with article-level citations.
items: Summarizes laws, regulations, and court decisions
Identifies relevant clauses and legal precedents
Upload a document for context-aware Q&A

cards.title: Document Drafting
cards.description: Generate standard legal documents from prompts, with context-aware content pre-filled based on your inputs.
items: Statutory letters, claims, and formal notices
Export to DOCX for final editing

cards.title: Legal Assistant
cards.description: Understand what the law means for your situation - not just what it says. Step-by-step guidance for common legal scenarios.
items: Tax obligations, reporting cycles, state compliance
Entity and clause extraction from uploaded docs
OCR support for scanned legal documents

steps.title: Ask in your language
steps.description: Type your question in Armenian, Russian, or English - or upload a contract, court decision, or scanned document for analysis.

steps.title: AI retrieves the law
steps.description: doLegal searches its indexed corpus of legislation and case law, retrieves the most relevant articles, and generates a grounded answer.

steps.title: Verify every citation
steps.description: Each answer includes article codes, law names, dates, and the responsible body. Every legal claim is traceable back to its source.

cards.title: Independent Lawyers & Accountants
cards.description: Solo professionals managing 10-20 active clients who spend 30-40% of their time on manual legal and tax compliance research.
wins: Research time: 2 hours -> 20 minutes per case
Draft standard contracts in minutes, not hours
Track tax and reporting rule updates with monthly refreshes

cards.title: Law & Accounting Firms
cards.description: Small teams that need consistent legal and tax document quality plus shared access to official legislation knowledge.
wins: Shared token pool for the whole team
Consistent citation quality on legal and tax deliverables

cards.title: SME Founders & Record keepers
cards.description: Business owners and in-house accountants who need to handle tax accounting responsibilities, submit reports, draft agreements, and navigate state compliance.
wins: Understand reporting cycles, tax duties, and filing requirements
Draft NDAs and employment contracts yourself
Join early access now, choose a plan at launch

pricing.description: Join early access now and we will notify you when subscriptions go live.
pricing.needsMoreTokensDescription: Top up your balance without changing your plan.

topupsDetailed.note: ≈ 15,000 words · heavier drafting or multi-session use

faq.q: Can I cancel or change plans anytime?
faq.a: Yes. Upgrades apply immediately with prorated billing, downgrades apply in the next billing cycle, and you can cancel any time. No contracts, no hidden fees.

faq.q: What happens if I run out of tokens?
faq.a: You can add a one-time top-up (10k / 20k tokens) to your current cycle without changing plans, or upgrade to a higher tier. Unused top-up tokens roll over for 30 days.
Plan tokens reset each cycle. Top-up tokens roll over for 30 days from purchase, so a bad week doesn't cost you the balance you've already paid for.

faq.q: Is VAT included in the quoted prices?
faq.a: Yes. Prices are listed in AMD and include VAT.

faq.q: How does the Rocket team plan work?
faq.a: Rocket gives a 2–10 person practice a shared 1,000,000 token pool, seat-based admin, and dedicated support. Larger firms should contact us for a custom plan.
doLegal is in early access. Pricing shown is the planned launch pricing. Join the waitlist and we'll invite you in batches as we open access — starting with independent practitioners in Yerevan.

faq.descriptionPrefix: Still have questions? Write to us at

items.question: Is this legal counsel?
items.answer: No. doLegal is a legal research and drafting tool - not a lawyer. All responses include a disclaimer and should be reviewed by a qualified legal professional before taking action.

items.question: How accurate are the citations?
items.answer: Every response is grounded in text retrieved from official legislation sources. We aim for maximum citation accuracy based on regular updates.

items.question: What languages does doLegal support?
items.answer: You can ask questions and receive answers in Armenian, Russian, or English. The legal corpus is primarily Armenian with cross-language retrieval.

items.question: What is a token? How many do I need?
items.answer: A token is a unit of AI processing - roughly 0.75 words. Typical legal questions use 500-1,500 tokens, while full drafts use more.

items.question: How fresh is the legal database?
items.answer: The corpus is updated monthly from official Armenian government legislation sources.

footer.description: AI-powered legal research and drafting for professionals. Built on official government legislation sources.

parity.heroDescriptionExact: Forward-thinking lawyers, accountants, and founders use doLegal to research legislation, draft documents, and navigate state compliance — grounded in the actual text of law.
parity.demoQuestion: When must I register for VAT as an individual entrepreneur in Armenia?
parity.demoAnswer: VAT registration becomes mandatory once turnover crosses the statutory threshold in any rolling 12-month period.
parity.demoInputPlaceholder: Ask a question in Armenian, Russian, or English…
parity.demoVatBody1P: Armenia's Tax Code sets a turnover-based VAT threshold measured across any 12 consecutive months, not a calendar year. On crossing it, the taxpayer becomes a VAT payer from the next transaction onward and takes on the full package of invoicing, reporting, and e-filing duties.
parity.demoVatBody2P: Register with the State Revenue Committee, switch your invoicing to e-invoices with the required VAT attributes, and begin monthly VAT returns.
parity.demoVatCite1Quote: A taxable person whose aggregate turnover exceeds the statutory threshold in any twelve consecutive months is recognized as a VAT payer from the moment prescribed by the Tax Code.
parity.demoVatCite2Quote: A registered VAT payer must issue VAT invoices, maintain VAT records, and submit VAT returns within the procedure and deadlines established by the Code.
parity.demoVatCite3Quote: Electronic invoices must contain mandatory tax fields and be submitted through the SRC electronic system in the approved format.
parity.demoDraftQuestion: Draft a service agreement for my company.
parity.demoDraftClarifyPrompt: Before I draft, drop a relevant document or add details about the counterparty.
parity.demoDraftClarifyReply: Term is 12 months, monthly payments, Yerevan jurisdiction.
parity.demoDraftAnswer: Service agreement prepared. Draft aligns with the RA Civil Code — pricing, payment terms, liability caps, and termination — with headings mapped to mandatory notice and defect-remedy rules.
parity.demoDraftBody1P: 1. Parties & Scope · 2. Price & Payment · 3. Performance & Delivery · 4. Warranties & Liability · 5. Termination & Notice · 6. Governing Law · 7. Signatures.
parity.demoDraftCite1Quote: Under the Civil Code provisions on services and works, the contractor undertakes to perform agreed work, and the customer undertakes to accept the result and pay the agreed fee.
parity.demoDraftCite2Quote: Monetary obligations are performed in the agreed amount and term; in case of delay, statutory interest may be charged as provided by law.
parity.demoDraftCite3Quote: If defects are discovered in the performed work, the customer may request free remediation, proportional price reduction, or reimbursement of remediation costs.
parity.demoDeadlineQuestion: What is the deadline to register an employee after starting operations?
parity.demoDeadlineAnswer: You must register the employee within 3 working days after the employment relationship begins. The same window applies for social-security and personal-income-tax enrolment with the SRC.
parity.demoDeadlineBody1P: The Labour Code requires the employer to register the employment relationship at its formal commencement. Implementing regulations specify a 3-working-day registration window for both labour and tax-administration purposes.
parity.demoDeadlineCite1Quote: The employer is required to ensure registration of the employment relationship in accordance with the procedure and timelines established by Armenian law.
parity.demoDeadlineCite2Quote: Employee registration data must be filed within three working days from the start date of employment through the prescribed state reporting procedure.
